'''Plooriod IV''', the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Plooriod system/Legends|Plooriod system]], was an agricultural territory of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==History==
During [[Operation Grain Snatch]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Overlord (Imperial)|Overlord]] [[Ghorin]]'s [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]], ''[[Halifax]]'', and her six [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] escorts were disabled by [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] above Plooriod IV The corvette was boarded by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] [[Storm (Delta-class)|''Storm'']], which stole her cargo while the shuttle groups ''[[Typhoon]]'', [[Thunder (shuttle group)|''Thunder'']] and [[Lightning (shuttle group)|''Lightning'']] captured her escorts.

Later, the Imperial [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] ''[[Red Wind]]'' was discovered near the planet and was [[Attack on the Red Wind|destroyed]] by three groups of Alliance corvettes [[Striker (corvette group)|''Striker'']], [[Hammer (corvette group)|''Hammer'']], and [[Arrow (corvette group)|''Arrow'']].

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[2008]], has an entry for [[Overlord (Imperial)|Overlord]] [[Ghorin]] which refers to his castle on Plooriod IV. This contradicts the ''Imperial Pursuit'' cut scene, which shows the castle on [[Plooriod III]]. Anyway, the Plooriod III's and Plooriod IV's entries are correct.
